message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

database "tuple" as tuple
actor "Upper\nlayer" as upper

box "IP Layer" #LightGray
participant "IPv4\nlayer" as ipv4layer
database "Routing\ntable" as routingtable
end box

box "IPv4 Ineterface" #LightGray
participant "IPv4\ninterface" as ipv4interface
database "ARP" as arp
end box

actor "Lower\nlayer" as lower

hnote over tuple #LightYellow : IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1

upper -> ipv4layer : IPdata

hnote over ipv4layer #LightYellow : Allocate\nIPv4\nheader

ipv4layer -> routingtable : dst=192.0.2.1
ipv4layer <-- routingtable

ipv4layer <.. tuple

hnote over tuple #LightYellow : IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1

ipv4layer -> ipv4interface
ipv4layer <.. ipv4interface

hnote over tuple #LightYellow : IPv4.src=198.51.100.2

ipv4interface -> arp : gw=198.51.100.1
ipv4interface <-- arp : mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01

ipv4interface <.. tuple

hnote over tuple #LightYellow : Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01

ipv4interface -> lower

@enduml
```
